title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 205.350 - County commission may purchase land for county hospitals — issuance of bonds
text:
205.350.  County commission may purchase land for county hospitals — issuance of bonds. — The county commission of any county in this state is hereby authorized to purchase, not exceeding one hundred and sixty acres of land, and locate, build and maintain thereon a county hospital.  Bonds may be issued therefor in accordance with the general law governing the issuance of bonds by counties.
(RSMo 1939 § 15157, A.L. 1945 p. 980) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 13941; 1919 § 12217; 1909 § 1351
